LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT STEWART TITLE GUARANTY COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE PRAYERS FOR EXEMPLARY AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES, AND ATTORNEYS FEES FROM THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST UNAMBIGUOUSLY PLEAD AGAINST WHOM HE IS SEEKING PUNITIVE AND EXEMPLARY DAMAGES. PLAINTIFF MUST ALSO STATE FACTS SHOWING THAT ATTORNEY FEES ARE WARRANTED OR ARE LIKELY TO BE WARRANTED. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-04-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT STEWART TITLE GUARANTY COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Brian D. Horwitz, Esq. of Bowles & Verna LLP 925/935-3300 for pltf & opposing party; Yesinia Garcia Perez, Esq. 984-9834 & Patrick T. Wong, Esq. 984-9891 of Foley & Lardner LLP for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - OVERRULED. Defendant will prepare a proposed form of order (as well as for the companion motion to strike). (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-04-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT STEWART TITLE GUARANTY COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE PRAYERS FOR EXEMPLARY AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES, AND ATTORNEYS FEES FROM THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Brian D. Horwitz, Esq. of Bowles & Verna LLP 925/935-3300 for pltf & opposing party; Yesinia Garcia Perez, Esq. 984-9834 & Patrick T. Wong, Esq. 984-9891 of Foley & Lardner LLP for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST UNAMBIGUOUSLY PLEAD AGAINST WHOM HE IS SEEKING PUNITIVE AND EXEMPLARY DAMAGES. PLAINTIFF MUST ALSO STATE FACTS SHOWING THAT ATTORNEY FEES ARE WARRANTED OR ARE LIKELY TO BE WARRANTED. Defendant to prepare a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
